caption: The video depicts a panel discussion taking place in a conference room or auditorium setting. Three individuals, two men and one woman, are seated on high stools behind small round tables, each equipped with microphones and water bottles. The man on the left is actively speaking, gesturing with his hands as he addresses the audience or the other panelists. The woman in the center appears to be listening attentively, with her hand near her face, possibly in thought or contemplation. The man on the right is also engaged, holding a microphone close to his mouth, suggesting he might be about to speak or is currently contributing to the conversation. The background features a large poster with text and an image of hands, indicating the theme of the discussion may relate to science, practice, and care. The audience is seated in rows of chairs, facing the panel, though they are not visible in the frame. The overall atmosphere suggests a formal yet interactive session, likely aimed at sharing knowledge or insights on a specific topic.
